step_rationale: Intrinsic pathway procoagulant cofactor; elevated in hypercoagulable states and thrombotic risk.
mechanism: Factor VIII elevation reflects a pro-coagulative state and augments the intrinsic tenase complex, increasing thrombin generation risk.
